label: Quarry Iron

materialPalette.wall: stone lower walls with dark timber bracing
materialPalette.floor: heavy plank and hard-packed work floor
materialPalette.roof: dark slate and patched metal sheets
materialPalette.trim: iron bands, soot-dark beams, and coal bins
materialPalette.accent: ore piles, weapon racks, barrels, and notice boards

notes: Use blockier footprints and yards so the settlement reads as work-first.
Keep roads wider around carts and ore staging.
